meaning: adj.松的,松懈的,不严格的,腹泻的,松驰的n.泻肚,[语]松元音
examples: One of the problem areas is lax security for airport personnel.
There have been allegations from survivors that safety standards had been lax.
It is shot through with waste, lax academic standards and mediocre teaching and scholarship.
"This smells, this really smells, " he said of the FAA's apparently lax oversight of Valujet before the crash.
He also says the U.S. economy is the big beneficiary of lax U.S.-Mexico border control.
